SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AnalysisSettings
A class containing the user's current image processing settings for the plugin.
BatchFileWorker
Created by a BatchWorker, applies the whole workflow to a specific input file, returns the corresponding ResultsTable after doing the particle analysis on the file.
BatchWindow
A batch mode window, offering to the user the possibility of processing a whole given directory with the current analysis settings.
BatchWorker
Manages the creation of sub-workers (BatchFileWorker), for processing the files from a given output directory.
Ends by merging results and exporting them to a newly created global '.csv'.
FooterLeftPanel
Creates the bottom panel of the LeftPanel, containing navigation buttons (Prev/Next).
HistogramPanel
A custom Swing component that draws an image histogram.
ImageSourcePanel
Creates the top panel of the LeftPanel, containing image status, current image management buttons and current parameters management buttons.
InputUtils
Utility class for managing inputs, currently only used by the PreprocessingPanel.
JSONManager
Handles AnalysisSettings export and import as JSON.
LDCService
Service exposing the API for manipulating parameters, operations, and the general state used for the Lipid Droplet Characterization Fiji plugin.
LDCServiceImpl
The implementation of the LDCService.
LeftPanel
The left side of the plugin main GUI.
LeftPanelSubPanel
Define the contract followed by each LeftPanel sub-panel.
MainGUI_LDC
The plugin main GUI.
MeasurementsManager
Provides measurements management operations.
MeasuresPreviewWorker
SwingWorker that take care of generating and returning the preview of the measures.
MeasuresProcessingWorker
SwingWorker that take care of processing measurements and returning them.
MorphologyManager
Provides binary morphological operations (Erode, Dilate, Open, Close, Watershed).
MorphologyPanel
Panel for the Binary Mask Refinement step of the pipeline.
PanelUtils
Utility class for creating and configuring standardized JPanels.
ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Provides particle analysis setup.
PipelineSubPanel
Define the contract followed by each LeftPanel sub-panel being part of the workflow pipeline.
PluginCommandLDC
Command associated with the menu entry Plugins>Lipid Droplets Characterization.
PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker
SwingWorker applying a median filter using ImageJ's RankFilters on a whole ImageStack.
PreprocessingManager
Provides preprocessing management operations.
PreprocessingPanel
Creates the middle panel of the LeftPanel, containing preprocessing controls (contrast enhancement and median filter).
PreprocessingPreviewMedianWorker
SwingWorker applying a median filter preview on an ImageProcessor.
RightPanel
The JPanel at the right in the MainGUI_LDC.
TestBinaryMaskOperations
Unit tests for LDC plugin binary mask operations, including : Erosion. Dilatation. Opening. Closing. Watershed.
TestJSON
Unit tests for importing / exporting LDC plug-in parameters as JSON.
TestPipeline
Integration tests, for the entire pipeline workflow with different scenarios, including .csv results check.
TestPlugin
Simply creates a new ImageJ interface, containing as well the plugin content (from src/main/java).
Entry point for development, instantly opens the MainGUI_LDC.
TestPreprocessing
Unit tests for LDC plugin preprocessing treatments, including : Contrast enhancement (preview). Median filter application.
TestSegmentation
Unit tests for LDC plugin segmentation/threshold treatments, including : Manual method. Otsu method. Moments method. Triangle method. Yen method. Li method. Dark background option.
ThresholdingManager
Provides segmentation and thresholding operations on ImagePlus objects.
ThresholdingPanel
The panel handling the Segmentation / Thresholding step.
Utils
Utility class for unit tests.
